items.title: NBA’s 7 Worst Deals, Ranked — Trae, Jaylen Brown, the Lakers, Plus 4 More
items.body_excerpt: Kawhi Leonard, LaMelo Ball, and Dean Wade (Soobum Im/Rich Storry/Patrick McDermott/Getty Images) Earlier this week, I covered the 13 NBA deals I liked most — the steals of the summer . I’m happy to report there are fewer deals I didn’t care for. But wow, did a handful of NBA…
